name: Soma Gold Corp.
summary: Soma Gold Corp., a junior gold mining company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in South America. It holds a 100% interest in the Zara exploration properties covering an area of approximately 29,000 hectares located in Antioquia, Colombia; the El Limon gold mine located in Colombia; and El Bagre gold mining complex located in the Antioquia, Colombia. It also holds interest in the Nech√É¬≠ Gold project located in Antioquia, Colombia. The company was formerly known as Para Resources Inc. and changed its name to Soma Gold Corp. in May 2020. Soma Gold Corp. is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
